zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Botreaux於大約1316年出生在英國可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾時，他的父親Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux22歲，母親Elizabeth of Cornwall21歲。他於1337年8月30日之前與Isabel de Moels在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年7月22日在英國多瑟特芒恩爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Botreaux于大约1316年出生在英国可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾时，他的父亲Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux22岁，母亲Elizabeth of Cornwall21岁。他于1337年8月30日之前与Isabel de Moels在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年7月22日在英国多瑟特芒恩爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Botreaux was born about 1316, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, his father, Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth of Cornwall, was 21. He married Isabel de Moels before 30 August 1337, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 July 1349, in Marnhull, Dorset, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Botreaux est né environ 1316, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Cornwall, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Moels avant 30 août 1337, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1349, à Marnhull, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Botreaux um 1316 in Boscastle, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth of Cornwall 21. Er hat vor 30. August 1337 in England Isabel de Moels geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1349 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Marnhull, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Botreaux è nato il circa 1316 nel Boscastle, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth of Cornwall, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Moels prima del 30 agosto 1337, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1349, nel Marnhull, Dorset, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Botreauxが約1316年にイギリスコルンワルボスカストルで生まれた時，父Reynold or Reginald de Botreauxは22歳，母Elizabeth of Cornwallは21歳であった。1337年8月30日以前にイギリスでIsabel de Moelsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年7月22日にイギリスドールセトマルンハルで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Botreaux(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 코른월 보스카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth of Cornwall(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1337년 8월 30일 이전 영국에서 Isabel de Moels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 7월 22일 영국 도르세트 마훌에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1338/1345: de 9 de janeiro de 1338 a 8 de janeiro de 1346
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Botreaux nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Cornwall, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Moels antes 30 de agosto de 1337, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1349, em Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Botreaux родился около 1316 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Cornwall, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Moels перед 30 августа 1337 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 июля 1349 г. в местности марнулл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Botreaux nació aproximadamente 1316, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of Cornwall, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Isabel de Moels antes de 30 de agosto de 1337, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1349, en Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
